disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus cruise ship kept in Rotterdam for extra cleaning - DutchNews.nl
updates.body_en: Hantavirus cruise ship kept in Rotterdam for extra cleaning DutchNews.nl
updates.summary_zh: 荷兰鹿特丹港汉坦病毒邮轮滞留进行额外清洁。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus cases from cruise outbreak rise to 13 following new case in Spain, WHO says - Internazionale
updates.body_en: Hantavirus cases from cruise outbreak rise to 13 following new case in Spain, WHO says Internazionale
updates.summary_zh: WHO称邮轮汉坦病毒疫情病例增至13例，西班牙新增1例。

updates.title_en: Deadly Hantavirus Reaches U . S . Soil : Quarantined Patients in Nebraska and Atlanta After Cruise Ship Outbreak Kills Three and Infects Dozens Worldwide
updates.summary_zh: 致命汉坦病毒抵达美国，内布拉斯加和亚特兰大患者隔离，邮轮疫情致3死数十感染。

updates.title_en: Captain of Hantavirus cruise horror quarantined in Poland - TVP World
updates.body_en: Captain of Hantavirus cruise horror quarantined in Poland TVP World
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒邮轮船长在波兰隔离。

updates.title_en: Inside an African lab that helped crack the hantavirus outbreak - sightmagazine.com.au
updates.body_en: Inside an African lab that helped crack the hantavirus outbreak sightmagazine.com.au
updates.summary_zh: 非洲实验室协助破解汉坦病毒疫情。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus Outbreak On Cruise Ship Triggers Intensive Cleaning Measures - NDTV
updates.body_en: Hantavirus Outbreak On Cruise Ship Triggers Intensive Cleaning Measures NDTV
updates.summary_zh: 邮轮爆发汉坦病毒，触发强化清洁措施。

updates.title_en: PitCo confirms local hantavirus risk differs from strain linked to cruise ship outbreak
updates.summary_zh: 皮特金县确认本地汉坦病毒毒株与邮轮不同。

updates.title_en: Brit hospitalised with hantavirus in the Netherlands after cruise ship outbreak returns to united kingdom
updates.summary_zh: 英国公民在荷兰感染汉坦病毒住院后返回英国。

updates.title_en: Three people released from Kansas hospital after hantavirus exposure
updates.summary_zh: 美国堪萨斯州三人因汉坦病毒暴露后出院。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus Cases In Colorado Have Health Officials Concerned
updates.summary_zh: 美国科罗拉多州汉坦病毒病例引发卫生官员担忧。

updates.title_en: Cruise ship at center of hantavirus outbreak to undergo extra cleaning
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒暴发中心的邮轮将进行额外清洁。

updates.title_en: Spain confirms second hantavirus case from MV Hondius
updates.summary_zh: 西班牙确认来自MV Hondius的第二例汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: Saskatoon researchers in ‘very early stages’ of animal testing for hantavirus vaccine - Global News
updates.body_en: Saskatoon researchers in ‘very early stages’ of animal testing for hantavirus vaccine Global News
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大萨斯卡通研究人员对汉坦病毒疫苗进行动物试验早期阶段。
